Skip to contents
c3dr 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Get point data from a c3d file

Source: R/convert.R
c3d_data.Rd

Get the point data in a data.frame

Usage

c3d_data(x, format = "wide")

Arguments

x

A c3d object, as imported by c3d_read().

format

Either "wide" (default), "long", or "longest" to determine the format of the resulting data frame. The wide format has Long format has three columns per point (x,y,z), the long format has three rows per frame per point (x,y,z). The longest format has one row per data entry.

Value

A data.frame with the c3d point data. The structure of the data frame depends on the 'format' argument.

Examples

# Import example data
d <- c3d_read(c3d_example())

# wide format (default)
w <- c3d_data(d)
head(w)
#>     LASI_x   LASI_y   LASI_z   RASI_x   RASI_y   RASI_z   LPSI_x   LPSI_y
#> 1 514.7515 426.1067 1111.939 517.2385 140.1397 1085.568 365.6084 348.0317
#> 2 514.1281 425.5054 1112.686 517.2141 140.0569 1085.616 365.5312 347.8595
#> 3 514.5764 425.8453 1112.585 517.1833 139.9610 1085.655 365.3459 347.6677
#> 4 514.4996 425.7862 1112.925 517.1443 139.9025 1085.665 365.2338 347.4144
#> 5 514.3743 425.7397 1113.257 517.0745 139.8348 1085.703 365.0397 347.1693
#> 6 514.2354 425.6333 1113.539 516.9551 139.7852 1085.729 364.8643 346.9028
#>     LPSI_z   RPSI_x   RPSI_y   RPSI_z   LKNE_x   LKNE_y   LKNE_z  LKNEM_x
#> 1 1196.890 362.9891 233.4178 1188.475 856.6883 477.4284 931.5396 861.6418
#> 2 1197.053 362.3742 232.8284 1188.329 856.9571 477.0051 932.9371 861.7914
#> 3 1197.217 363.8182 233.2654 1188.284 857.0815 476.5963 933.9788 861.9058
#> 4 1197.338 362.7978 232.8914 1188.641 857.1405 476.2250 934.7276 862.6093
#> 5 1197.483 363.4906 232.7668 1188.364 857.1215 475.8634 935.1044 861.8013
#> 6 1197.551 363.3411 232.5191 1188.353 857.0359 475.5696 935.1613 862.4017
#>    LKNEM_y  LKNEM_z   LTH1_x   LTH1_y   LTH1_z   LTH2_x   LTH2_y   LTH2_z
#> 1 348.6893 912.6926 556.9407 445.5279 1093.233 461.5810 484.5138 996.9789
#> 2 348.3167 914.0199 556.6924 445.3139 1094.011 461.6376 484.5572 997.5353
#> 3 347.9895 914.8847 556.4611 445.0827 1094.675 461.6241 484.5927 998.0654
#> 4 347.3712 915.1040 556.2866 444.8941 1095.249 461.6314 484.5922 998.5113
#> 5 347.4216 915.7787 556.1267 444.7067 1095.651 461.5277 484.5135 998.8354
#> 6 346.9744 915.3457 556.0225 444.5397 1095.916 461.4491 484.4469 999.0923
#>     LTH3_x   LTH3_y    LTH3_z   LANK_x   LANK_y   LANK_z  LANKM_x  LANKM_y
#> 1 618.8198 490.6886  999.7836 593.8951 465.1286 594.5244 619.9271 374.1197
#> 2 618.8777 490.4714 1000.6926 598.0743 465.2888 592.5154 623.8638 376.5699
#> 3 618.9465 490.2716 1001.4639 602.1898 465.4188 590.2581 627.3254 374.0181
#> 4 618.9608 490.0875 1001.9938 606.1637 465.5125 587.6623 631.0927 373.5570
#> 5 618.9377 489.8663 1002.3292 609.6573 465.9942 584.9485 635.5870 373.1499
#> 6 618.8387 489.6512 1002.4543 613.5326 466.1401 581.8519 638.2738 374.0753
#>    LANKM_z   LSH1_x   LSH1_y   LSH1_z   LSH2_x   LSH2_y   LSH2_z   LSH3_x
#> 1 598.0766 824.4224 485.3911 840.5141 705.0750 482.8584 809.3229 757.4846
#> 2 596.0382 825.5483 485.0948 841.4969 706.5760 482.5997 808.8657 759.6621
#> 3 594.5025 826.5903 484.8466 842.1768 708.0157 482.3233 808.0698 761.8004
#> 4 592.3682 827.5000 484.6260 842.5121 709.3627 482.0387 806.9543 763.7773
#> 5 589.8939 828.3488 484.4037 842.5389 710.6137 481.8004 805.5677 765.7426
#> 6 586.9269 829.0675 484.2529 842.2091 711.8052 481.5560 803.8725 767.5718

#> 1 479.3876 753.7142 514.7704 422.6205 603.3215 720.0737 413.6890 478.2625

#> 5 676.0384 480.7918 466.9814 669.5934 108.4214 655.2002 675.4896 231.5287
#> 6 681.5680 481.0319 464.8879 670.4794 108.4669 655.7390 676.3953 231.6453
#>    RKNEM_z   RTH1_x   RTH1_y   RTH1_z   RTH2_x   RTH2_y   RTH2_z   RTH3_x
#> 1 639.7902 551.4991 102.0260 957.8770 438.0938 100.8567 908.0378 545.8603

#> 6   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN   NaN

# long format
l <- c3d_data(d, format = "long")
head(l)
#>     frame type      LASI      RASI      LPSI      RPSI     LKNE    LKNEM
#> 1.x     1    x  514.7515  517.2385  365.6084  362.9891 856.6883 861.6418
#> 1.y     1    y  426.1067  140.1397  348.0317  233.4178 477.4284 348.6893
#> 1.z     1    z 1111.9390 1085.5681 1196.8900 1188.4749 931.5396 912.6926
#> 2.x     2    x  514.1281  517.2141  365.5312  362.3742 856.9571 861.7914
#> 2.y     2    y  425.5054  140.0569  347.8595  232.8284 477.0051 348.3167
#> 2.z     2    z 1112.6857 1085.6162 1197.0529 1188.3287 932.9371 914.0199
#>          LTH1     LTH2      LTH3     LANK    LANKM     LSH1     LSH2     LSH3
#> 1.x  556.9407 461.5810  618.8198 593.8951 619.9271 824.4224 705.0750 757.4846
#> 1.y  445.5279 484.5138  490.6886 465.1286 374.1197 485.3911 482.8584 479.3876
#> 1.z 1093.2332 996.9789  999.7836 594.5244 598.0766 840.5141 809.3229 753.7142
#> 2.x  556.6924 461.6376  618.8777 598.0743 623.8638 825.5483 706.5760 759.6621
#> 2.y  445.3139 484.5572  490.4714 465.2888 376.5699 485.0948 482.5997 479.2451
#> 2.z 1094.0111 997.5353 1000.6926 592.5154 596.0382 841.4969 808.8657 753.8408

#> 1.x 514.7704 720.0737 653.1116 667.4582 673.4458 551.4991 438.0938 545.86029
#> 1.y 422.6205 413.6890 480.0068 108.2254 231.1162 102.0260 100.8567  84.82973
#> 1.z 603.3215 478.2625 473.0594 654.0651 639.7902 957.8770 908.0378 825.10217

#> 1.y 100.9527 192.4435  94.89973 103.2638  91.90547 147.6142 165.8960  92.26361
#> 1.z 253.8246 251.2333 551.63342 421.1098 456.49829 250.8705 145.5502 130.36067
#> 2.x 525.5106 542.3630 644.93109 617.2792 558.32330 445.6599 659.3677 598.75525

#> 1.x  817.4973  846.1919  851.1216  950.8621  901.9384 1157.3271 1111.2330
#> 1.y  312.4762  457.3620  172.5256  542.5662  488.9170  504.6099  539.2634
#> 1.z 1494.7443 1443.5385 1432.2704 1148.9841 1107.3885  984.6085  948.0496
#> 2.x  817.5986  846.0604  851.0892  950.7581  901.9533 1157.2476 1110.3347
#> 2.y  312.5214  457.5100  172.7556  542.5716  488.8383  504.7896  538.0922
#> 2.z 1494.9412 1443.4917 1432.2625 1148.9624 1107.3729  984.6223  947.3290
#>           RELB      RELBM      RWRA       RWRB        *41 *42 *43 *44 *45 *46
#> 1.x  940.60437  891.22693 1152.2423 1117.87744  -560.7023 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 1.y   47.00834   84.46903  114.9173   60.25620 -2763.9976 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 1.z 1134.70654 1085.36401  980.4835  941.77240   704.2748 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN

#> 2.y   47.04180   84.49938  114.9496   60.39595 -2763.4602 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 2.z 1134.75696 1085.43201  980.4124  941.79321   704.2449 NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#>     *47 *48 *49 *50 *51 *52 *53
#> 1.x NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 1.y NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 1.z NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 2.x NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 2.y NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
#> 2.z NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN

# longest format
ll <- c3d_data(d, format = "longest")
head(ll)
#>        frame type point     value
#> 1.LASI     1    x  LASI  514.7515
#> 2.LASI     1    y  LASI  426.1067
#> 3.LASI     1    z  LASI 1111.9390
#> 1.RASI     1    x  RASI  517.2385
#> 2.RASI     1    y  RASI  140.1397
#> 3.RASI     1    z  RASI 1085.5681
